description.en: A number that indicates the accumulated time that all audio samples and complete video frames have spent in the jitter buffer, in seconds.

excerpt.es: A number that indicates the accumulated time that all audio samples and complete video frames have spent in the jitter buffer, in seconds.
excerpt.en: A number that indicates the accumulated time that all audio samples and complete video frames have spent in the jitter buffer, in seconds.

description.en: A positive integer indicating the total number of audio samples and/or video frames that have come out of the jitter buffer.

excerpt.es: A positive integer indicating the total number of audio samples and/or video frames that have come out of the jitter buffer.
excerpt.en: A positive integer indicating the total number of audio samples and/or video frames that have come out of the jitter buffer.

description.en: A number that indicates the minimum delay that might be achieved given only the network characteristics such as jitter and packet loss.

excerpt.es: A number that indicates the minimum delay that might be achieved given only the network characteristics such as jitter and packet loss.
excerpt.en: A number that indicates the minimum delay that might be achieved given only the network characteristics such as jitter and packet loss.

description.en: ADOMHighResTimeStampthat indicates an application's preferred hold time for media in the jitter buffer, allowing it influence the tradeoff between playout delay and the risk of running out of audio or video frames due to network jitter.

excerpt.es: ADOMHighResTimeStampthat indicates an application's preferred hold time for media in the jitter buffer, allowing it influence the tradeoff between playout delay and the risk of running out of audio or...
excerpt.en: ADOMHighResTimeStampthat indicates an application's preferred hold time for media in the jitter buffer, allowing it influence the tradeoff between playout delay and the risk of running out of audio or...

description.en: A number that indicates the accumulated target jitter buffer delay.

excerpt.es: A number that indicates the accumulated target jitter buffer delay.
excerpt.en: A number that indicates the accumulated target jitter buffer delay.
